name: Transcend ESD380C 500GB USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C Portable SSD - Ruggedized Silicone Rubber Case - UASP (USB Attached SCSI Protocol) - MIL-STD-810G Standard - Transfer Speed Up to 2,000 MB/s (TS500GESD380C)
